title: Fluffy Indulgent Moroccan Tomatoes Tagine
description: A rich, creamy, and comforting Moroccan tomato tagine that becomes delightfully fluffy when simmered with a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add the finely chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the ground ginger, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and cinnamon; cook, stirring, for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in the crushed canned tomatoes and vegetable broth, then stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, cover, and let it cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the heavy cream; simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice to taste, adjusting acidity as desired.
Remove from heat and garnish with chopped fresh parsley and cilantro before serving.
Serve the fluffy, indulgent tomato tagine over couscous, rice, or with crusty bread.
